content: City officials have slowed the development by stalling building permits for the area.（画线词 stalling）
explanation: stall 意为拖延、搁置，与 delay（推迟）含义最接近。

content: Sales of the new drug have been stopped, pending further research.(画线词：pending)
explanation: pending 作介词表示“在等待……期间”，等同于 waiting for。

content: We had a difficult time during the financial crisis, but eventually things turned out all right.(画线词：turned out)
explanation: turn out 意为结果变得、最终成为，与 become 同义。

content: The young emperor had at his disposal a very powerful light infantry army with experienced officers and very high morale.(画线词：at his disposal)
explanation: at one's disposal 表示归某人支配、由某人掌控，对应 under his control。

content: He has been down on his luck lately, his company went bankrupt and his girlfriend broke up with him.(画线词：down on his luck)
explanation: down on one's luck 是固定短语，意为时运不济、遭遇厄运。

content: Predictions of a disastrous slump in industry were proved unfounded by strong demand and continually increasing sales.(slump)
explanation: slump 在此指经济、行业的衰退、下滑，与 decline（下降、衰退）同义。

content: In the first five years of reform, the country's GDP soared by almost 40%.(soared)
explanation: soar 表示（数值、规模）猛增、飙升，对应 increase（增长）。

content: He skimped for years to pay back the money that he borrowed for his college education.(skimped)
explanation: skimp 意为省吃俭用、节俭度日，do without 表示省掉、将就度日，语义匹配。

content: When I was on the dole, I got £5.50 per week from the government and spent £2.50 on the rent.(the dole)
explanation: on the dole 是英式固定表达，指领取失业救济金，等同于 welfare（福利救济）。

content: Mr. Wilson wanted new recipients to be eligible for aid for only one year, but some Democrats wanted two years.(eligible for aid)
options: unmarried in order to get aid
explanation: eligible for aid 意为有资格获得救助，对应 able to get help。
